description: 完整 72 鏡頭 Zaouli 超現實舞蹈 MV - 5 分鐘演唱會級製片

volumes.description: 開場四部曲：設景、開拍、高潮、重擊 + CTO 補充四部曲
無人機俯視、幻影舞者、聲波視覺化、宇宙能量
微觀宇宙、古代儀式、能量場、時間跳躍、光線描繪
倒映水面、聲波頻譜、終極高潮爆炸能量
序列轉折、絲絹飄舞、雙重曝光、懸浮舞蹈、靈魂出竅
重新啟動、宇宙視角、多重視角、液態光澤、絕對高潮、永恆終幕

aesthetic_specifications.visual_language: Stop-motion puppet, claymation aesthetic with surreal time-warp effects
aesthetic_specifications.color_grade: Golden hour + Neon cyan + Deep shadows
aesthetic_specifications.cinematic_style: Hyper-realistic volumetric lighting, multiple exposure, motion blur, particle effects

processing_notes: Total generation time estimate: ~2-3 hours (depending on Kling queue)
Post-processing: FFmpeg concat with audio synchronization
Fallback: If any shot fails, re-submit individual prompt

quality_checkpoints: Beat synchronization: Verify first and last shot align with music beats
60fps consistency: All shots must be 60fps for seamless concat
Aesthetic coherence: Prompts maintain surreal Zaouli theme throughout
Transition smoothness: Audio mix should have no clips or gaps
